dashboard.label: SplunkGate — Regulator Evidence Pack
dashboard.description: Examiner-grade audit artifact: NIST AI RMF function mapping, SR 26-2 scope quote, EU AI Act Article 6 mapping, profile-gated HIPAA / PCI panels, PDF export. SplunkGate events colocate with the Cisco Security Cloud sourcetype family (Splunkbase 7404) so SOC + compliance share the same query surface.
